title: Ezra's Rainbow Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Baby Ezra discovers colorful friends hiding behind rainbow flaps in this interactive peek-a-boo adventure. Each page reveals a new color and animal friend with delightful sounds and surprises that encourage prediction and participation.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, Ezra! Who's hiding behind red?

illustration.description: Smiling baby Ezra with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits on a soft white blanket, reaching toward a bright red flap. His dark eyes sparkle with curiosity and his chubby hands are outstretched. The background is cream-colored with gentle watercolor washes.
illustration.alt: Baby Ezra reaching for red peek-a-boo flap

pages.text: Moo! It's a red cow. Hello, cow!

illustration.description: A friendly red cow with big gentle eyes and a pink nose peeks out from behind the lifted red flap. Ezra claps his hands in delight, his mouth forming a perfect 'o' of surprise. Soft pastel background with high contrast red cow.
illustration.alt: Red cow saying hello to excited baby Ezra

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, Ezra! Who's hiding behind orange?

illustration.description: Ezra sits cross-legged, patting a bright orange flap with both palms. His expression shows anticipation and joy. A diverse group of soft toy animals sits nearby including a brown teddy bear and white bunny. Warm orange and cream color palette.
illustration.alt: Ezra patting orange peek-a-boo flap with toys nearby

pages.text: Roar! It's an orange tiger. Hi, tiger!

illustration.description: A cuddly orange tiger with black stripes and friendly amber eyes emerges from the flap. Ezra giggles with his arms raised up high in excitement. The tiger has a sweet, non-threatening expression with rounded features perfect for babies.
illustration.alt: Friendly orange tiger greeting giggling baby Ezra

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, Ezra! Who's hiding behind yellow?

illustration.description: Ezra crawls toward a sunny yellow flap, his diaper visible and tiny socks on his feet. His mother, a beautiful woman with medium brown skin and natural hair, watches lovingly from the background. Soft yellow sunbeam effects create warmth.
illustration.alt: Crawling baby Ezra approaching yellow flap while mother watches

pages.text: Quack! It's a yellow duck. Splash, duck!

illustration.description: A bright yellow rubber duck with an orange beak bobs cheerfully from behind the flap. Ezra sits in shallow bathwater, splashing happily with water droplets sparkling around him. His mother's gentle hands support him safely. High contrast yellow against soft blue water.
illustration.alt: Yellow duck in bath with splashing baby Ezra and supportive mother

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, Ezra! Who's hiding behind green?

illustration.description: Ezra stands holding onto a low table, pulling at a forest green flap. His father, a tall man with dark skin and a warm smile, kneels beside him offering encouragement. Soft indoor lighting creates cozy shadows and green nature elements in background.
illustration.alt: Standing baby Ezra pulling green flap with encouraging father nearby

pages.text: Hop! It's a green frog. Jump, frog!

illustration.description: A bright green frog with big round eyes and webbed feet leaps from the flap. Ezra bounces on his toes trying to copy the frog's movement while his father claps. The scene has lily pad decorations and soft green watercolor washes creating a pond-like atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Green frog jumping while baby Ezra bounces and father claps

illustration.description: Ezra waves his chubby hand goodbye while all the colorful animals (red cow, orange tiger, yellow duck, green frog) wave back from the corners of the page. His whole family surrounds him with loving smiles. Rainbow colors create a joyful, complete feeling.
illustration.alt: Baby Ezra waving goodbye to all colorful animal friends with family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the red cow make?
questions.explanation: The red cow says 'Moo!' just like real cows do.

questions.question: Which animal is yellow?
questions.explanation: The yellow duck says 'Quack!' and likes to splash in the water.

questions.question: What does the green frog do?
questions.explanation: The green frog says 'Hop!' and jumps around happily.
